Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class DatacloudCompany

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.DatacloudCompany
public class DatacloudCompany extends SObject

Java class for DatacloudCompany complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="DatacloudCompany">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ActiveContacts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AnnualRevenue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="City" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CompanyId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Country" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CountryCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DunsNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EmployeeQuantityGrowthRate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExternalId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Fax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FortuneRank" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IncludedInSnP500" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Industry" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsInCrm" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsInactive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsOwned" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NaicsCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NaicsDesc" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumberOfEmployees" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Ownership" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Phone" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PremisesMeasure" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PremisesMeasureReliability" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PremisesMeasureUnit" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PriorYearEmployees" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PriorYearRevenue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SalesTurnoverGrowthRate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Sic" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SicCodeDesc" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SicDesc" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Site" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="State" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StateCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Street" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TickerSymbol" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TradeStyle" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UpdatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Website" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="YearStarted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Zip" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
